scripts.build: rm -rf ./scottsmith666.github.io && vite build && mv ./dist ./scottsmith666.github.io && cd ./scottsmith666.github.io && git init && git add . && git commit -m "Website content update." && git branch -M master && git remote add origin git@github.com:ScottSmith666/scottsmith666.github.io.git && git push -u origin master --force
